validated_core: NISRAM is exactly recoverable from AGLAPRIMOGENITUSON by a specific ordinal vector.
new_candidate_result: The reversed pair MARSIN is recoverable from the same source by multiple ordinal vectors; the best-ranked candidate shows low combinatorial complexity, which supports a non-random reversal-pair hypothesis.
important_honesty_note: This is still not a proof that every paired table name is generated by one universal mirror law.
article_grade_direction: The strongest near-publication claim is now an ordinal name-engine plus reversal-pair organization hypothesis, with NISRAM/MARSIN as the flagship case.
